narrative:
Washington Twp (precinct in Defiance County) has 836 registered voters, with 49.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.8 percentage points.
